name: Lemon Raspberry Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Fresh/Frozen Raspberries (no syrup, do not thaw)
recipeInstructions:
Frozen raspberries should be without syrup and should not be thawed.
1. Preheat oven to 425°F. Grease 12 muffin cups with vegetable oil.
2. In a large bowl, mix together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together half-and-half, oil, lemon extract, and eggs until well combined.
4. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring until just mixed.
5. Gently fold in the raspberries.
6. Divide batter among prepared muffin cups, filling each about 3/4 full.
7. Bake for 18-23 minutes, or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow muffins to cool for 5 minutes before removing from pans.
